original_statement: where there more or less episodes in january 1995 than october 1994?
mutated_statement: where there more or less something in one time than another time?
mutation_analysis: [实体泛化 + 时间细节泛化]: 名词"episodes"被泛化为"something" | 具体时间"january 1995"和"october 1994"被泛化为"one time"和"another time" (episodes → something | january 1995 → one time | october 1994 → another time)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的内容可识别关键证据：agent给出了逐月计数并写道“Counting episodes per month: October 1994: 2... January 1995: 3... Therefore, December 1994 had more episodes... Prediction Answer is correct.”（judge_thought与simple_query输出均包含具体数值和比较结论）。Agent的具体表现是直接按自己的理解统计并比较两个月份的剧集数，给出明确结论且未提出任何澄清问题或表明不确定性。没有使用ambiguous、unclear、需要更多信息或无法确定等措辞，亦未对变异问题中的泛化（something/one time/another time）表现出识别或请求澄清。因此应归入“无法意识到指令模糊”。
